result.stdout:
Cnct:
  A cross-platform bootstrapping tool. Connect your dotfiles / cnct the dots!

Usage:
  Cnct [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <c>    Path to a configuration file. If not supplied, a file
                      called 'cnct.json' in the current directory will be
                      used, if it can be found.
  -q, --quiet         Suppress all output other than errors.
  -d, --debug         Output additional debug information.
  --version           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help      Show help and usage information
